Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ValidationFailureImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ValidationFailureImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ValidationFailure
public final class ValidationFailureImpl
extends Object
implements ValidationFailure
Default implementation of ValidationFailure.

    Adds contextual information associated with the failure.

  • Constructor Details

    • ValidationFailureImpl

      public ValidationFailureImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, Class<? extends Exception> exceptionType, String message)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      exceptionType - the type of exception associated with the failure
      message - the message associated with the failure
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if validator, exceptionType or message are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if message is empty

  • Method Details

    • getCause

      public Throwable getCause()
      Returns the underlying cause of the exception.
      Returns:
      the underlying cause of the exception

    • setCause

      public ValidationFailureImpl setCause​(Throwable cause)
      Sets the underlying cause of the exception.
      Parameters:
      cause - the underlying cause of the exception
      Returns:
      this

    • addContext

      public ValidationFailureImpl addContext​(String name, Object value)
      Adds contextual information associated with the failure.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a variable
      value - the value of the variable
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if name is null or empty

    • addContext

      public ValidationFailureImpl addContext​(List<ContextLine> context)
      Adds contextual information to append to the message.
      Parameters:
      context - the list of name-value pairs to append to the exception message
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if context is null

    • createException

      public <T extends Exception> T createException​(Class<T> type)
      Creates an exception that corresponds to with this failure.
      Specified by:
      createException in interface ValidationFailure
      Type Parameters:
      T - type the type of exception to create
      Parameters:
      type - the type of exception to create
      Returns:
      the created exception
